header.title: Hello!
header.subtitle: I'm a full-stack developer & graphic designer.
header.paragraph: I'm a software developer, and I'm passionate about creating software that improves the world.

card.title: Ocean Monitor
card.paragraph: A web application that monitors the ocean and alerts the user when it's too dangerous to swim.
card.caption: March 2020

card.title: Ultra-Fast-Food
card.paragraph: A web application that allows users to order food in real-time.
card.caption: January 2020

card.title: Ultra-Fast-Food
card.paragraph: A web application that allows users to order food in real-time.
card.caption: January 2020

card.paragraph: A web application that allows users to order food in real-time.
